_meta.description: Canonical shared project memory. All agents read/write through src/memory.js — never edit by hand.

decisions.title: QA agent runs on a separate port (3003)
decisions.rationale: Keeps Dev and QA concerns independently deployable and testable.

decisions.title: Strict failure-payload contract (5 required fields)
decisions.rationale: Guarantees Dev Agent always receives machine-parseable failure data without defensive checks.

decisions.title: Retry loop guard with escalation to CTO Agent
decisions.rationale: Prevents infinite Dev↔QA loops; CTO Agent generates a structured fix ticket after max retries.

decisions.title: No-progress detection in feedback loop (fingerprint comparison)
decisions.rationale: Catches stuck loops before hitting maxCycles; triggers early CTO escalation.

decisions.title: Docker multi-stage build targeting node:20-alpine with non-root user
decisions.rationale: Minimal attack surface; non-root (appuser) satisfies container security baseline.

decisions.title: Shared project memory stored in memory/project-memory.json
decisions.rationale: Single source of truth readable by all agents at runtime; JSON for machine access, markdown synced for humans.

constraints.constraint: No merge to main without QA pass
Max 3 QA retries before CTO escalation
QA Agent only tests Definition of Done — no scope creep
All secrets injected via environment variables — never committed
Evidence files written to ./evidence — excluded from git
